title: ClearMarket Market
description: One row per market per platform. Raw venue data + ClearMarket editorial fill on top. Auto-ingested daily from Kalshi and Polymarket public APIs. API response shape includes the derived field cross_platform_link, computed at serve time. Thematic grouping across events is handled via tags on the linked event, not via fields on markets.

platform_market_id.description: Venue's native ID. Kalshi ticker (e.g., 'KXFED-26APR-T3.25') or Polymarket conditionId.

event_id.description: FK to events.event_id. Nullable — editorial assignment. Market can exist without an event.

platform_event_id.description: Platform's own grouping identifier (informational). Kalshi event_ticker; Polymarket event slug.

contract_type.description: Binary YES/NO or true-scalar payout. v0.1 only populates binary; scalar support v0.2+.

contract_multiplier.description: Notional per contract. Usually 1.0 for binaries.

underlying_reference.description: Editorial: specific real-world data reference (e.g., 'BLS Series CUUR0000SA0', 'S&P 500 index close per S&P Dow Jones Indices', 'Credible news reporting — no specific feed').

last_trading_date.description: Last tradeable date. May differ from close_at.

resolution_rules_raw.description: Full rules text from platform. Source for the parsed resolution_triggers.

exclusions.description: What explicitly does not count as resolution.

resolution_risks.description: Known edge cases or dispute scenarios.

resolution_mechanism.description: Who arbitrates disputes. Stored column (not derived).

proposer_model.description: Who can propose resolution outcomes. 'managed_whitelist' captures UMA MOOV2 (Aug 2025 — whitelist of 37 proposers).

resolution_source_name.description: What data is cited. Editorial fill for Polymarket where API is blank or prose is vague ('consensus of credible reporting').

resolution_source_url.description: Link to the data source itself (not the arbiter's admin page).

resolution_source_type.description: Objectivity classification of the data source.

contract_terms_url.description: Kalshi PDF link to full contract terms. Kalshi-only.

resolution_outcome.description: Once resolved: 'YES', 'NO', or scalar value. Null until resolved.

resolution_value.description: For scalar markets: final numeric value. Null for binary.

first_seen_at.description: When ClearMarket first ingested this market.

cross_platform_link.description: DERIVED AT API SERVE TIME. Summary of markets sharing the same event_id across platforms. Shape: {kalshi: {market_count}, polymarket: {market_count}}. Null if no event_id assigned.

field_provenance.description: Per-field provenance. Keys are field names; values indicate 'platform_api' / 'clearmarket_editorial' / 'derived' / 'null_by_venue_limitation'.
